collection_method: Scraped via Python 'google-play-scraper' library, sorted by NEWEST, from the Canadian region store.
cleaning_decisions: Removed duplicates and reviews under 3 words. Removed emojis, special characters (non-ASCII), and punctuation. Converted all numbers to string representations. Lowercased text, normalized whitespace, removed NLTK English stop words, and applied WordNet lemmatization.
